# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    nginx \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    supervisor \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /run/postgresql /var/run/redis

RUN sed -i 's/^#\?port = .*/port = 6379/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/^supervised .*/supervised no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/^daemonize .*/daemonize no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf || true

RUN echo "listen 80 default_server;" > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default && \
    echo "server_name _;" >> /etc/nginx/sites-available/default && \
    echo "location / {" >> /etc/nginx/sites-available/default && \
    echo "    return 200 'web server running';" >> /etc/nginx/sites-available/default && \
    echo "    add_header Content-Type text/plain;" >> /etc/nginx/sites-available/default && \
    echo "}" >> /etc/nginx/sites-available/default

RUN useradd -r -s /usr/sbin/nologin appuser && \
    mkdir -p /opt/api

RUN printf '%s\n' \
'from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer' \
'class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):' \
'    def do_GET(self):' \
'        self.send_response(200)' \
'        self.send_header("Content-Type", "text/plain")' \
'        self.end_headers()' \
'        self.wfile.write(b"api server running")' \
'    def log_message(self, format, *args):' \
'        return' \
'HTTPServer(("0.0.0.0", 8080), Handler).serve_forever()' \
> /opt/api/server.py

RUN chown -R appuser:appuser /opt/api

RUN printf '%s\n' \
'[supervisord]' \
'nodaemon=true' \
'' \
'[program:nginx]' \
'command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g "daemon off;"' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'priority=10' \
'' \
'[program:api]' \
'command=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/api/server.py' \
'user=appuser' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'priority=20' \
'' \
'[program:postgresql]' \
'command=/usr/bin/bash -lc "mkdir -p /var/run/postgresql && chown postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql && [ -d /var/lib/postgresql/16/main ] || pg_createcluster 16 main --start && exec /usr/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/16/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/16/main/postgresql.conf"' \
'user=root' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'priority=30' \
'' \
'[program:redis]' \
'command=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf --bind 0.0.0.0 --protected-mode no' \
'autostart=true' \
'autorestart=true' \
'priority=40' \
> /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
